metadata.title: AI Video Generator Free Online - Seedance 2.0 | Toolaze
metadata.description: Create AI videos free online with Toolaze. Use text, images, video clips, or audio with Seedance 2.0 to generate 15-second 1080p videos.

modelIntro.title: Why Seedance 2.0 Works for AI Video Generation
description: Seedance 2.0 powers Toolaze AI video generation with a unified multimodal workflow. Start from a text prompt, add reference images, include short video clips, or guide the result with audio in the same creative flow.

The model is useful when a simple text-to-video prompt is not enough. You can combine natural language with visual and audio references to steer style, motion, pacing, and scene direction for short-form video ideas.

Toolaze uses Seedance 2.0 for online video creation while keeping the page focused on the broader AI video generator task: fast ideation, social clips, ad concepts, product shots, and pre-production previews.

featureCards.title: Multimodal Video Input
featureCards.content: Use text, images, video clips, and audio references to guide one AI video generation workflow.

featureCards.title: 15-Second 1080p Output
featureCards.content: Create short, high-definition videos suited for ads, social media, storyboards, and concept previews.

featureCards.title: Director-Level Control
featureCards.content: Describe lighting, camera movement, character action, mood, and timing directly in your prompt.

hero.desc: Create 15-second 1080p videos with Toolaze AI Video Generator, powered by Seedance 2.0. Start from text, images, video clips, or audio references, then turn ideas into short cinematic clips online.

intro.title: Your Free Online AI Video Generator

content.title: Create From More Than Text
content.text: A broad AI video generator should handle more than one starting point. Toolaze supports text prompts, reference images, short video clips, and audio references through Seedance 2.0, so you can move from a simple idea to a more controlled video direction without switching tools.

content.title: Build Short Clips for Real Workflows
content.text: Use the AI video generator for social posts, product showcases, ad concepts, mood shots, storyboard tests, and creative drafts. The page also connects to narrower workflows like text to video and image to video when you already know how you want to start.

content.title: Use Seedance 2.0 With Clear Expectations
content.text: Seedance 2.0 is strongest for short, high-quality clips with clear prompts and concrete references. Review generated motion, text, product details, and brand-sensitive elements before publishing, especially for commercial or client-facing work.

faqTitle: Frequently Asked Questions About AI Video Generator

faq.q: What is Toolaze AI Video Generator?
faq.a: Toolaze AI Video Generator is an online video creation page powered by Seedance 2.0. It helps you create short AI videos from text prompts, reference images, short video clips, and audio references, depending on the workflow you choose.

faq.q: Is this AI video generator the same as text to video?
faq.a: Text to video is one workflow inside the broader AI video generator page. This page also covers image-guided video, video references, and audio-guided direction. If you only want text prompts, use the dedicated text-to-video page.

faq.q: Can I create AI videos from images?
faq.a: Yes. Seedance 2.0 supports reference images, which can help guide the subject, composition, product look, or visual style. For a narrower workflow, Toolaze also has an image-to-video page under the Seedance 2.0 model.

faq.q: How long can the generated videos be?
faq.a: The Seedance 2.0 spec used by Toolaze supports short video generations up to 15 seconds. This length is useful for social clips, product previews, ad concepts, and storyboard-style creative tests.

faq.q: Does the AI video generator support audio?
faq.a: Yes. Seedance 2.0 supports audio references and can generate video with dual-channel audio. Use audio guidance when mood, pacing, sound direction, or timing matters to the result.

faq.q: Do I need to sign up to try it?
faq.a: Toolaze is designed for quick online access, and free availability may depend on current quota, model availability, and selected settings. Check the page for the latest access details before starting a longer workflow.

faq.q: What prompts work best for AI video generation?
faq.a: Use prompts that describe the subject, action, camera movement, lighting, environment, style, and timing. Add references when visual consistency matters, and review the output before using it in commercial or client-facing work.
